title: MedPanel Synthesis Output
description: Structured output of the moderator/synthesis agent. This is the final user-facing structure. The moderator consumes all specialist outputs across all rounds and produces this unified synthesis. Based on moderator.md prompt phases. All enums via $ref to shared-definitions.json.

specialists_synthesized.description: Agent IDs whose outputs were synthesized.

rounds_synthesized.description: How many discussion rounds were included in this synthesis.

safety_summary.description: Phase 1 of moderator prompt: ALWAYS FIRST priority. Aggregated safety flags from all specialists, deduplicated with multi-specialist agreement notation.

escalation_note.description: If safety flags conflicted between specialists, this notes the escalation to the higher level

interaction_warnings.description: Critical drug/supplement interactions surfaced for the patient

consensus_items.description: Phase 2: Points where specialists agree. Categorized by consensus level.

false_consensus_flag.description: If set, one of: POSSIBLE_ECHO_CHAMBER, CONFIDENCE_EXCEEDS_EVIDENCE, SUSPICIOUS_UNANIMITY. Null if consensus is genuine.

devils_advocate_note.description: Counter-argument from the devil's advocate pass, if triggered

divergent_items.description: Phase 3: Points where specialists disagree. Never picks a winner.

resolution_status.description: How (or whether) this disagreement was resolved during discussion

perspectives.description: Two or more competing perspectives. Not limited to exactly 2.

patient_factors_favoring.description: Patient-specific factors that make this perspective more applicable

user_guidance.description: Actionable framing for the user (e.g., 'If your CAC score is > 0, perspective A applies...')

decision_framework.description: Conditional recommendation when consensus was not reached (e.g., 'It depends on X')

evidence_landscape.description: Phase 5: Evidence grouped by quality tier using the unified evidence_tier scale. All three legacy tier systems (GRADE, supplement S-D, functional medicine 1-4) are mapped to the unified scale.

strong.description: Claims supported by strong evidence (RCTs, meta-analyses, strong guidelines)

moderate.description: Claims with moderate evidence (smaller RCTs, observational, conditional guidelines)

preliminary.description: Claims with preliminary evidence (pilot studies, case series)

mechanistic_or_theoretical.description: Claims based on mechanism of action or theoretical reasoning without clinical data

insufficient.description: Claims where evidence is insufficient to draw conclusions

being_researched.description: Active areas of research where evidence may change

key_citations.description: Most important citations referenced across the synthesis

recommendations.description: Synthesized recommendations from all specialists, deduplicated and prioritized. Each tracks its source and consensus status. Aligns with SQL recommendations table.

source_recommendation_ids.description: Original recommendation IDs from specialist outputs (e.g., ['R-ENDO-001', 'R-CARD-002'])

contraindication_note.description: Any contraindication concerns raised during cross-examination

questions_for_doctor.description: Synthesized from all specialists' questions, deduplicated and prioritized. This is the primary user-facing output.

context.description: Why this question matters for this specific patient

ask_who.description: Who is best suited to answer this question

information_gaps.description: Aggregated information gaps from all specialists. Actionable: tells the user what additional data would improve the analysis.

impact_on_recommendations.description: Which recommendation_ids would change if this gap were filled

deferred_concerns.description: New concerns raised in Round 3 that were not cross-examined. Flagged for future consultations.

disclaimers.description: Standard disclaimers per PRODUCT-POSITIONING.md. Generated by the moderator, not the specialists.

standard_disclaimer.description: The PRODUCT-POSITIONING.md disclaimer: 'MedPanel is an exploration and education tool...'

evidence_limitations.description: Specific limitations of the evidence reviewed in this consultation

profile_completeness_note.description: If profile was incomplete (< 0.70), what impact that had on the analysis

budget_limitation_note.description: If budget was exceeded before full consensus, notes what was left unresolved

meta.description: Metadata about the synthesis process itself.
